title: A Dream Within A Dream by Edgar Allan Poe — Inspirational Poetry Lines
content:
Take this kiss upon the brow!
And, in parting from you now,
Thus much let me avow--
You are not wrong, who deem
That my days have been a dream:
Yet if hope has flown away
In a night, or in a day,
In a vision or in none,
meaning: "A Dream Within A Dream" by Edgar Allan Poe is a inspirational poem consisting of 25 lines. The poet explores themes of inspirational through vivid imagery and emotional depth. Beginning with "Take this kiss upon the brow! And, in parting from you now,...", this piece captures the essence of human experience and invites reflection on the deeper currents of life and feeling. This work is part of Edgar Allan Poe's celebrated body of poetry that continues to resonate with readers worldwide.
